understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by moving selectable pieces and pushable objects to reach and satisfy the goal tiles marked as '+', ultimately winning when the engine reports WIN for the final level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece by one cell in the specified direction, potentially pushing adjacent pushable objects if they are not blocked; walls block movement and prevent shifts; selection is switched by using the CLICK action with a target position to control another selectable piece.
